title: 4. Skin depth of Location
text:
The needle size should be differ based on skin thickness. The ﬁnest skin is around the
eyes, so use the ﬁnest needles and choose transverse or oblique angle of insertion and do not
insert too deep. Lower cheek and jaw have the thickest skin of the face, so the practitioner
can use relatively thicker needles, up to 0.25mm. General relative skin thickness (mm)  of
17
the face is shown in the following picture.
R.Y. Ha, et al. Analysis of Facial Skin Thickness: Deﬁning the Relative Thickness Index. Plastic and Reconstructive
17
Surgery, 2005 May.
~ !  ~
67
Facial  Cosmetic Acupuncture
1. ‘Location of needle insertion’    -
Location of needle insertion is indicated with a white circle with black boundaries. In a
darker area like the temporalis covered with hair, black circles with white boundaries are
used to display needle location.
2. ‘Thickness, diameter of needle’   -   Color
I used three kinds of thickness of needles and differentiated them with three colors. Green
represents 0.12mm, red 0.16mm, and blue 0.20mm for the diameter of the needle.
3. ‘Angle of insertion’   -   Arrow shape
Three are three insertion angles. A circular arrow head represents a perpendicular angle
(90°), a regular arrow represents an oblique angle (45°), and a blunt arrow head represents a
transverse angle (15°). Transverse-oblique angle (15-45°) is also displayed with the regular
arrow head, and I add explanations as needed.
4. ‘Insertion depth’ - Number
Insertion depth is not depicted in the illustration but is explained separately. Maximum
length of the needle in this book is 15mm. This is an easy and effective length to maneuver.
That is why insertion depth here is from 3mm up to 15mm. For actual treatment, the
experienced practitioner can use longer, thicker, or very thin needles based on the purpose
and the patient’s build. Usually, when you treat a muscle and myofascia, you might need
longer and thicker needles. This book is written for the beginner, so that you can see your
patients with minimum risk. You can start from 15mm and then use various depths and
thickness later.
Angle
Needle
Arrow
Depth in this book
Perpendicular
(90°)
It may vary depending on the subcutaneous
thickness. Usually, the depth of insertion is
between 3 and 10mm.
Oblique
(45°)
Usually, the depth of insertion is between 5 and
15mm.
Transverse
(15°)
Usually, the depth of insertion is between 5 and
10mm.

68
LEGEND
Facial  Cosmetic Acupuncture
✔Legend,  example.
: Arrow’s color represents diameter of needle, so this green arrow indicates 0.12mm-
diameter needle. Also, shape of arrow head means angle of insertion, so this blunt
arrow head indicates transverse-angle insertion.
✔Please remember this.
Everyone’s face is not the same, but different and unique, so choosing the diameter of
needle, the angle of insertion, and the insertion depth should be modiﬁed individually.
~ !  ~
69
Facial  Cosmetic Acupuncture
